<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ enum NativeType: string { case Array = 'array'; case Bool = 'bool'; case Callable = 'callable'; case ClosedResource = 'resource (closed)'; case Float = 'float'; case Int = 'int'; case Iterable = 'iterable'; case Null = 'null'; case Numeric = 'numeric'; case Object = 'object'; case Resource = 'resource'; case Scalar = 'scalar'; case String = 'string'; }
